steps.title: Identify the key evidence
steps.content: The passage presents archaeological evidence: both clam size and abundance increased in the area where the ancestors' terraced garden practice was used.

steps.title: Apply the evidence to the conclusion
steps.content:
Size increase indicates robustness; abundance increase indicates effective maintenance of the food source—exactly what choice D claims.

The other choices either compare to absent evidence, introduce undiscussed information, or make claims about current practice unsupported by the text.

That matches choice D — D is correct.
